name: Employer Ignores Injury Report in Draper

mainEntity.name: What if employer ignores my slip report in Draper?
mainEntity.text: What if employer ignores my slip report in Draper?

acceptedAnswer.text: Document ignore resubmit in writing file directly with Labor Commission if no action in 3 days.[6]

suggestedAnswer.text: Retaliation risk high. Commission investigates. Back benefits from injury date if proven. Witnesses crucial. Just Work Comp firms file fast for delayed claims.[6]

description: Document ignore resubmit in writing file directly with Labor Commission if no action in 3 days.[6]
